name: Whole Wheat Honey Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
2. In a large bowl, mix together the brown sugar, margarine, honey, vanilla, and egg until well combined.
3. Stir in the remaining ingredients: whole wheat flour, salt, and baking soda.
4. Drop dough by rounded tablespoons about 2 inches apart onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
5. Bake for 9-11 minutes or until lightly browned around the edges.
6. Remove from the cookie sheet immediately and cool on wire racks.
